info.title: Tenbyte Livestream API
info.description: Live video and audio transcoding infrastructure as a service. Ingest via RTMP/SRT (push) or pull from upstream sources, transcode to adaptive bitrate, deliver via HLS/DASH.

audioPull.summary: Audio — pull ingest with backup, HLS only

videoWithRecording.summary: Video push + library recording + webhook + meta

videoWithRecordingCreated.summary: Video stream + library recording + webhook + meta

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Values below 1 fall back to 1.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Items per page. Capped at 100; values below 1 fall back to 10.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort direction by creation time. Unknown values fall back to desc.

delete.description: Stops stream if live. Removes stream key. Does not delete recordings.

post.description: Force-disconnects the encoder. Stream object stays, can go live again.
Restarts the transcoding process on the transcoder service. Sets status to `starting`. Fails if stream is already live.
Old key invalid immediately. Disconnects active stream if live.

Internal endpoint called by the transcoder service when a stream's
status changes. Authenticated via shared secret in `X-Webhook-Secret`
header, not JWT/API key.

On receive: updates stream status, creates audit event, and dispatches
a signed webhook to the customer's configured `webhook_url` (if set).

protocols.description: Required when `kind=push`. Server emits the corresponding RTMP/SRT publish URLs.

backup.description: Optional fallback endpoint. Allowed for both `push` (secondary publish target) and `pull` (failover source).

LadderRequest.description:
Provide `video[]` for `mode=video` (max 6 renditions) or `audio[]` for
`mode=audio` (max 3 renditions). Mixing is rejected.

PackagingRequest.description:
Per-protocol settings. `hls` required when `output_protocols` includes
`hls`. `dash` required when `output_protocols` includes `dash`. `dash`
is not allowed for `mode=audio`.

LadderResource.description: Echoed ladder. Either `video[]` or `audio[]` is populated based on `mode`.

crf.description: Optional. Present only when set in the request.

IngestResource.description:
For `kind=push` the server echoes accepted `protocols` and emits `rtmp`
+ `srt` publish URLs derived from the auto-generated stream key. For
`kind=pull` the submitted `primary` and optional `backup` endpoints are
echoed back.

rtmp.description: Push only. RTMP publish base URL: `rtmp://host:1935/live`. Pair with `stream_key`.

srt.description: Push only. SRT publish URL with SRS streamid encoding (key embedded).

hls.description: HLS master playlist URL (null when `hls` not in `output_protocols`)

dash.description: DASH manifest URL (null when `dash` not in `output_protocols`)

StreamListItemResource.description: List-row projection of a stream. Excludes publish credentials (stream_key, ingest URLs) and heavy config blocks (ladder, packaging, playback, recording, meta) — those appear only on the detail resource.

value.message: Missing authorization. Provide Authorization header or X-API-Key header.

errors.message: ladder.video is required for video streams

WebhookSecretAuth.name: X-Webhook-Secret
WebhookSecretAuth.description: Shared secret for transcoder webhook callbacks
